code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output: a single rating 1-5 (e.g. "Rating: 3" or just "3")
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear statements such as "terrible," "junk," "don't buy," "returned," "doesn't work"
    - Safety hazards or total failure automatically lean toward 1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - More negative than positive
    - Significant flaws, poor quality, missing parts, misleading description
    - Some limited usefulness but strong disappointment
    - Product fails after short period or underperforms vs alternatives
    - Language such as "cheap," "useless," "not as pictured," "pain to use"

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons
    - "It's okay," "average," "not great but not terrible"
    - Works but with noticeable limitations
    - Conflicted or moderate tone
    - If sentiment is clearly mixed and neither side dominates, choose 3
    - Short, factual negative statements without strong emotion may be 3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Mostly positive with minor criticisms
    - Product works well but not perfect
    - Phrases like "pretty good," "above average," "would recommend"
    - Minor complaints that are noticeable but do not override satisfaction
    - If review is positive but has any criticism of core functionality → 4
    - Price praised despite limitations → 4 if tone is positive but not exceptional

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Strong satisfaction and enthusiasm
    - Clear recommendation to others
    - Exceeds expectations
    - Very positive overall tone, even if lacking extreme adjectives
    - Phrases like "love it," "perfect," "excellent," "extremely happy," "worth every penny," "very nice," "great"
    - If review expresses clear recommendation and strong satisfaction despite minor, non-core flaws → 5
    - Overall excellence with only trivial/nitpicky criticisms → 5
    - Explicit overall 5-star rating in text overrides criticism of specific aspects

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Mixed sentiment: Weigh overall conclusion more heavily than isolated complaints.
    - Updates: If a review ends negatively after an update, prioritize the final evaluation.
    - Sarcasm: Detect implicit negativity even if positive words are used ironically.
    - Comparison phrasing: If the reviewer says they would not buy again → likely 1 or 2.
    - "Better than nothing" → usually 3.
    - Minor inconvenience but strong satisfaction → 4.
    - If product is praised as "good" or "useful" without strong enthusiasm → 4.
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: It's not a good vacuum. It's hard to pick up dirt and then it will spit it out so you have to go over and over the same area. I wouldn't buy it again.
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: Very poor quality. Cheap fabric, not as pictured and the color was off. Returned the next day.
Rating: 1

Example 3:
Review: Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. This machine would freshen up the carpets but never ...
Rating: 2

Example 4:
Review: This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), a...
Rating: 2

Example 5:
Review: The cushions are okay, but the size was waaaay off for my rocker. I'm still using it though because it is better than nothing.
Rating: 3

Example 6:
Review: These are really nice IF you only use them for bigger items. They are too thick and bulky for smaller items.
Rating: 3

Example 7:
Review: Didn't work. Had to send it back.
Rating: 3

Example 8:
Review: I'd rate this as pretty good although it doesn't feel quite as heavy duty as the ones we've been using for the past few years... Overall I'd rate this as above average although only time will tell how durable it is.
Rating: 4

Example 9:
Review: They're okay, but not extraordinary. They seem to be well made and are holding up so far with no problems, and the fact that you can toss them into the washing machine to be cleaned is nice. They're just a bit on the thin side as well, though, so you wouldn't want these to be your first choice for a heavy-duty task.
Rating: 4

Example 10:
Review: This is a good, and rather useful bin. It's well made, has sturdy handles, and gets lots of use in our house, which says a lot. When not in use, it collapses, though again we use it a lot. Sometimes we put more weight in here that perhaps we should, but the container and the handles never seem to complain.
Rating: 5

Example 11:
Review: This mattress get 4 stars for comfort, but there's so many other nice features about it that it gets 5 starts for everything else. To begin with, I wouldn't suggest using this as a long term every day bed for someone. The shallow design and budget price make this a good mattress for the trundle bed ...
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

  Rating 4: 2 example(s)
  Rating 5: 2 example(s)

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (34 total misclassified):

  gold 5 -> 3: 1

To begin with, I wouldn't suggest using this as a long term every day bed for someone. The shallow design and budget pr..." (gold=5, pred=4, workers=[4, 5, 4], disagreement=0.17)
    - Example: "After a couple days a giant (though compact by queen sized bed standards) box arrived, and while I anticipated the weight (I've had a few of these shipped to me), it's still heavy.  Ideally you'll get this unpacked in the AM, as it does take a moment..." (gold=5, pred=4, workers=[4, 5, 4], disagreement=0.17)
  Pair gold=4 vs pred=5: 10 errors
    - Example: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..." (gold=4, pred=5, workers=[5, 4, 5], disagreement=0.17)
    - Example: "This is exactly what I have been looking for to use on my outdoor dining set. The design is beautiful. The tablecloth itself is made of good quality fabric. I like that spills wipe up so easily. I really like that there's a place for the umbrella pol..." (gold=4, pred=5, workers=[5, 5, 4], disagreement=0.17)
  Pair gold=2 vs pred=3: 1 errors

(gold=2, pred=3, workers=[2, 3, 3], disagreement=0.17)

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This mattress get 4 stars for comfort, but there's so many other nice features about it that it gets 5 starts for everything else. To begin with, I wouldn't suggest using this as a long term every day bed for someone. The shallow design and budget pr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), a..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [2, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "After a couple days a giant (though compact by queen sized bed standards) box arrived, and while I anticipated the weight (I've had a few of these shipped to me), it's still heavy.  Ideally you'll get this unpacked in the AM, as it does take a moment..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is exactly what I have been looking for to use on my outdoor dining set. The design is beautiful. The tablecloth itself is made of good quality fabric. I like that spills wipe up so easily. I really like that there's a place for the umbrella pol..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Give Thanks Plaid is such a pretty fall pattern. The colors look great together and it can even be used going into the Christmas season if you're pairing it with rustic, country holiday decor. This tablecloth looks AMAZING with red or green plates, b..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "So far this blender is working well for me. I've made a few strawberry banana smoothies for my kids and it's worked fine each time. One thing that wasn't skimped on was the looks. The build design of these blenders is very sharp looking, having a bri..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Didn't work. Had to send it back."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [1, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I am a fan of the DII everyday kitchen basics. The oval terry potholders are an essential item in the kitchen. When you are cooking, you will at some point need to pick a pan out of the oven or a pot off the stove and they can both burn you if you do..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Really enjoy these small pans for my toaster oven."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 34 errors, 18 borderline out of 80 examples."}
